description: Temporal workflow test adopts the tenant id and password and skips hosted-only activities.
Temporal workflow test preserves the hosted behavior when appliance-only inputs are absent.
Chart-render contract test proves the appliance bootstrap command is appliance-create-tenant.mjs and contains no legacy TSX invocation.
Chart-render contract test proves Temporal address, namespace, and task queue are injected for appliance bootstrap.
Release workflow dry-run accepts a complete same-revision app, Temporal worker, config, and chart set.
Release workflow dry-run rejects missing Temporal worker and stale config/chart artifacts without moving stable.
Registry verification resolves stable to the expected app, Temporal worker, config, chart, and control-plane digests.
Clean-appliance smoke test observes workflow appliance-initial-tenant complete on local Temporal and verifies the DB tenant id.
Clean-appliance smoke test signs in with the configured initial administrator after bootstrap.
Recover-mode retry test confirms a failed workflow can rerun without creating a duplicate tenant.
